title: Trump Will Let Ukraine Build Patriots. Ukraine Wants to Make Homegrown Missiles Too.
summary_full: The Ukrainian firm Fire Point has produced weapons that hit Russian territory. Its next goal, developing an antimissile system, is a much bigger challenge, experts said.
summary_public: The Ukrainian firm Fire Point has produced weapons that hit Russian territory. Its next goal, developing an antimissile system, is a much bigger challenge, experts said.

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: Ukraine Wants to Make Homegrown Missiles Too.
